exercises.title: If/Else: Even or Odd
exercises.instructions: Print 'Even' if the number is divisible by 2, otherwise print 'Odd'.
exercises.hints: The else branch runs when the if condition is false

exercises.title: Grade Calculator
exercises.instructions:
Given score = 72, print the grade using this scale:
90-100 -> A
80-89  -> B
70-79  -> C
60-69  -> D
Below 60 -> F
exercises.starter_code:
let score = 72;

// Determine and print the grade
exercises.hints: Use else if for each range. Check from highest to lowest.

exercises.title: If/Else: Adult or Minor
exercises.instructions: Print 'Adult' if age is 18 or more, otherwise 'Minor'.
exercises.hints: Use >= to include exactly 18 as an adult

exercises.title: If/Else: Larger Number
exercises.instructions: Given a = 12 and b = 9, print the larger number.
exercises.hints: Compare with > and print whichever is bigger

exercises.title: Number Range Check
exercises.instructions:
Given number = 42, check if it's within range 1-100.
Print "In range" or "Out of range".
exercises.hints: Use && to combine two conditions: number >= 1 && number <= 100

exercises.title: If/Else: Positive or Non-Positive
exercises.instructions: If num is greater than 0 print 'Positive', otherwise print 'Non-positive'.
exercises.hints: The else branch handles 0 and negatives together

exercises.title: If/Else If/Else: Sign of a Number
exercises.instructions: Given num = 0, print 'Positive' if > 0, 'Negative' if < 0, otherwise 'Zero'.
exercises.hints: else if is checked only if the first if is false

exercises.title: If/Else If/Else: Grade Letter
exercises.instructions: Given score = 75, print 'A' if >= 90, 'B' if >= 75, 'C' if >= 50, otherwise 'F'.
exercises.hints: The first matching branch wins — order matters

exercises.title: If/Else with AND: In Range
exercises.instructions: Given x = 15, print 'In range' if x is between 10 and 20 inclusive, otherwise 'Out of range'.
exercises.hints: Combine two conditions with the && operator

exercises.title: If/Else with OR: Weekend
exercises.instructions: Given day = 'Sun', print 'Weekend' if day is 'Sat' or 'Sun', otherwise 'Weekday'.
exercises.hints: Use the || operator between the two equality checks
